repos.last_desc: Official codebase for "Causal Forcing: Autoregressive Diffusion Distillation Done Right for High-Quality Real-Time Interactive Video Generation"
repos.manual_desc: Causal Forcing: diffusion distillation for real-time interactive video.

repos.last_desc: Borrowing Google’s GPUs because your laptop sounds like a jet engine trying to take off. High-end diffusion for the hardware-challenged artist.
repos.manual_desc: SD WebUI Colab: run Stable Diffusion in Colab when your GPU taps out.

repos.last_desc: Why diffuse when you can predict? Generative images that think in visual next-tokens. The autoregressive revolution that makes pixels feel as smart as language.
repos.manual_desc: Autoregressive image generator that predicts visual tokens instead of diffusion.

repos.last_desc: Official Implementation of 'OmniCustom: Sync Audio-Video Customization Via Joint Audio-Video Generation Model'
repos.manual_desc: OmniCustom: joint audio-video model for synchronized customization.

repos.last_desc: [NeurIPS 2025] Let Them Talk: Audio-Driven Multi-Person Conversational Video Generation
repos.manual_desc: MultiTalk: audio-driven multi-person conversational video generation.

repos.last_desc: Turning boring logic into visual spectacles that explain what your code actually does. Finally, a way to show non-coders your beautiful backend logic in motion.
repos.manual_desc: Turn code into explainer videos - logic-to-visual walkthroughs.

repos.last_desc: Helios: Real Real-Time Long Video Generation Model
repos.manual_desc: Helios: real-time long-video generation model.

repos.last_desc: text and image to video generation: CogVideoX (2024) and CogVideo (ICLR 2023)
repos.manual_desc: CogVideo: text- and image-to-video generation models.

repos.last_desc: An easy 1-click way to create beautiful artwork on your PC using AI, with no tech knowledge. Provides a browser UI for generating images from text prompts and images. Just enter your text prompt, and see the generated image.
repos.manual_desc: One-click Stable Diffusion on PC with a simple browser UI.

repos.last_desc: The everything bagel of diffusion models—one model for generation, editing, and more. Why switch models when you have a unified genius that does it all?
repos.manual_desc: Unified diffusion model for generation and editing in one model.

repos.last_desc: Voyager is an interactive RGBD video generation model conditioned on camera input, and supports real-time 3D reconstruction.
repos.manual_desc: Voyager: RGB-D video generation with real-time 3D reconstruction.

repos.last_desc: Multi-Platform Package Manager for Stable Diffusion
repos.manual_desc: StabilityMatrix: cross-platform package manager for Stable Diffusion.

repos.last_desc: Official PyTorch implementation of One-Minute Video Generation with Test-Time Training
repos.manual_desc: TTT-Video-DiT: one-minute video generation via test-time training.

repos.last_desc: Code for "EgoX: Egocentric Video Generation from a Single Exocentric Video"
repos.manual_desc: EgoX: egocentric video generation from a single exocentric view.

repos.last_desc: An official OpenAI toolkit for social scientists and data scientists to measure quantitative attributes in text, images, or audio using the GPT API.
repos.manual_desc: GABRIEL: measure attributes in text, images, or audio with GPT.

repos.last_desc: "ViMax: Agentic Video Generation (Director, Screenwriter, Producer, and Video Generator All-in-One)"
repos.manual_desc: ViMax: agentic pipeline for end-to-end video generation.

repos.last_desc: Tencent Hunyuan3D-1.0: A Unified Framework for Text-to-3D and Image-to-3D Generation
repos.manual_desc: Hunyuan3D-1.0: unified text-to-3D and image-to-3D framework.

repos.last_desc: AI-assisted storyboard and video generation tool. Uses Gemini for generating storyboard text and frames, Vertex AI Veo for generating transition clips, and ffmpeg for stitching the final video. Built-in logs and gallery management.
repos.manual_desc: Storyboard-to-video pipeline: Gemini prompts, Veo clips, ffmpeg stitching.

repos.last_desc: A web application for prompt generation and multiple ComfyUI remote and local connections for image and video generation in parallel in an infinite canvas
repos.manual_desc: Infinite-canvas app for prompts and multiple ComfyUI backends in parallel.

repos.last_desc: Wiring up the future of cinematic AI with node-based precision. Maximum control for those who like their video workflows like their pasta: spaghetti-style.
repos.manual_desc: ComfyUI nodes for LTXVideo - cinematic video workflows in a graph.

repos.last_desc: Native Stable Diffusion that makes your Mac’s Neural Engine actually work for its living. Generating art so cool it keeps your MacBook’s fans completely silent.
repos.manual_desc: Native Stable Diffusion for macOS using the Neural Engine.

repos.last_desc: [ICLR 2026] LongLive: Real-time Interactive Long Video Generation
repos.manual_desc: LongLive: real-time interactive long-video generation.

repos.last_desc: Your AI film editor that has an uncanny knack for finding the viral gold in your long footage. Extracting the best moments without the ego of a Hollywood director.
repos.manual_desc: AI editor that finds the best moments in long videos and cuts them fast.

repos.last_desc: SkyReels V3: Multimodal Video Generation Model
repos.manual_desc: SkyReels-V3: multimodal video generation model.

repos.last_desc: HuMo: Human-Centric Video Generation via Collaborative Multi-Modal Conditioning
repos.manual_desc: HuMo: human-centric video generation with multimodal conditioning.

repos.last_desc: The batteries-included Pythonic way to generate art without the UI clutter. Just pip install and watch your terminal start dreaming in color.
repos.manual_desc: imaginAIry: batteries-included Python image generation toolkit.

repos.last_desc: The best OSS video generation models, created by Genmo
repos.manual_desc: mochi: open-source video generation models from Genmo.

repos.last_desc: [NeurIPS 2025] Wan-Move: Motion-controllable Video Generation via Latent Trajectory Guidance
repos.manual_desc: Wan-Move: motion-controllable video generation via latent trajectories.

repos.last_desc: A unified inference and post-training framework for accelerated video generation.
repos.manual_desc: FastVideo: unified training and inference for faster video generation.

repos.last_desc: A general-purpose AI image generation framework that supports Hugging Face, Gitee, Model Scope, and more.
repos.manual_desc: peinture: general-purpose image generation framework.

repos.last_desc: SwarmUI (formerly StableSwarmUI), A Modular Stable Diffusion Web-User-Interface, with an emphasis on making powertools easily accessible, high performance, and extensibility.
repos.manual_desc: Modular, high-performance Stable Diffusion Web UI for power users.

repos.last_desc: Because waiting shouldn't be part of your creative process. Squeezing every millisecond out of your latent space for near-instant gratification.
repos.manual_desc: fast-stable-diffusion: speed-tuned SD notebooks for quick generation.

repos.last_desc: HunyuanVideo-Foley: Multimodal Diffusion with Representation Alignment for High-Fidelity Foley Audio Generation.
repos.manual_desc: HunyuanVideo-Foley: multimodal diffusion for high-fidelity Foley audio.

repos.last_desc: Diffusion model(SD,Flux,Wan,Qwen Image,Z-Image,...) inference in pure C/C++
repos.manual_desc: stable-diffusion.cpp: run diffusion models in pure C/C++.

repos.last_desc: Stable Diffusion with a focus on clean UX and a no-headache workflow. All the generative power you crave, packaged in a UI that actually makes sense.
repos.manual_desc: Sygil WebUI: clean, no-headache Stable Diffusion interface.

repos.last_desc: Breathing life into static images at the speed of light. The lightweight champion for turning still into cinematic without the heavy overhead.
repos.manual_desc: LightX2V: lightweight image-to-video generation.

repos.last_desc: We present StableAvatar, the first end-to-end video diffusion transformer, which synthesizes infinite-length high-quality audio-driven avatar videos without any post-processing, conditioned on a reference image and audio.
repos.manual_desc: End-to-end video diffusion for long, audio-driven avatar videos from a reference image.

repos.last_desc: NeMo Retriever Library is a scalable, performance-oriented document content and metadata extraction microservice. NeMo Retriever extraction uses specialized NVIDIA NIM microservices to find, contextualize, and extract text, tables, charts and images that you can use in downstream generative applications.
repos.manual_desc: NeMo Retriever: microservices to extract text/tables/charts/images for gen AI.

repos.last_desc: A python tool that uses GPT-4, FFmpeg, and OpenCV to automatically analyze videos, extract the most interesting sections, and crop them for an improved viewing experience.
repos.manual_desc: Auto-find highlights and crop videos into Shorts using GPT + FFmpeg.

frameworks.title: 🧠 Research & Core Frameworks
frameworks.description: ML/NLP frameworks, agent platforms, research-grade core libraries

repos.last_desc: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
repos.manual_desc: Superpowers: agentic skills framework and dev methodology.

repos.last_desc: An Open Phone Agent Model & Framework. Unlocking the AI Phone for Everyone
repos.manual_desc: Open-AutoGLM: phone-agent model and framework for device automation.

repos.last_desc: Outcome driven agent development framework that evolves
repos.manual_desc: Hive: outcome-driven agent framework that evolves with use.

repos.last_desc: The original Swiss Army Knife that turned every developer into an AI engineer overnight. With more integrations than your favorite app store, if it has an API, we’ve already wrapped it for you.
repos.manual_desc: LangChain: huge integration hub for LLM apps, tools, and agents.

repos.last_desc: TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework
repos.manual_desc: TradingAgents: multi-agent LLM framework for financial trading.

repos.last_desc: 🌟 The Multi-Agent Framework: First AI Software Company, Towards Natural Language Programming
repos.manual_desc: MetaGPT: multi-agent framework that turns specs into working software.

repos.last_desc: Why work alone when your AI agents can have a meeting about it? The ultimate multi-agent playground where LLMs collaborate to do your chores.
repos.manual_desc: AutoGen: multi-agent collaboration framework for complex tasks.

repos.last_desc: LLM-powered framework for deep document understanding, semantic retrieval, and context-aware answers using RAG paradigm.
repos.manual_desc: WeKnora: RAG framework for deep document understanding and retrieval.

repos.last_desc: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.
repos.manual_desc: Transformers: the go-to library for state-of-the-art text/vision/audio models.

repos.last_desc: What are the principles we can use to build LLM-powered software that is actually good enough to put in the hands of production customers?
repos.manual_desc: 12-Factor Agents: practical principles for production-grade agents.

repos.last_desc: A lightweight, powerful framework for multi-agent workflows
repos.manual_desc: OpenAI Agents SDK: lightweight framework for multi-agent workflows.

repos.last_desc: Framework for orchestrating role-playing, autonomous AI agents. By fostering collaborative intelligence, CrewAI empowers agents to work together seamlessly, tackling complex tasks.
repos.manual_desc: Multi-agent orchestration for role-based collaboration on complex tasks.

repos.last_desc: An Open Source Machine Learning Framework for Everyone
repos.manual_desc: TensorFlow: open-source ML framework for training and inference at scale.

repos.last_desc: Python ETL framework for stream processing, real-time analytics, LLM pipelines, and RAG.
repos.manual_desc: Pathway: streaming ETL and real-time analytics for LLM/RAG pipelines.

repos.last_desc: Putting LLMs on a 1-bit diet for extreme efficiency and speed. Proving that 0 and 1 are all you really need to be incredibly smart.
repos.manual_desc: BitNet: 1-bit LLM research for extreme efficiency.

repos.last_desc: LlamaIndex is the leading document agent and OCR platform
repos.manual_desc: LlamaIndex: document agent and OCR platform for LLM apps.

repos.last_desc: From the team behind Gatsby, Mastra is a framework for building AI-powered applications and agents with a modern TypeScript stack.
repos.manual_desc: Mastra: modern TypeScript framework for building AI apps and agents.

repos.last_desc: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.
repos.manual_desc: SGLang: high-performance serving framework for LLMs and multimodal models.

repos.last_desc: Not just a bot, but an autonomous agent with a soul and a social life. Building the next generation of on-chain personalities that actually talk back.
repos.manual_desc: Eliza: autonomous on-chain agent with a social personality.

repos.last_desc: Python SDK for Agent AI Observability, Monitoring and Evaluation Framework. Includes features like agent, llm and tools tracing, debugging multi-agentic system, self-hosted dashboard and advanced analytics with timeline and execution graph view
repos.manual_desc: SDK for agent/LLM observability: tracing, debugging, and analytics dashboards.

repos.last_desc: A Flexible Framework for Experiencing Heterogeneous LLM Inference/Fine-tune Optimizations
repos.manual_desc: ktransformers: heterogeneous inference and fine-tuning for LLMs.

repos.last_desc: The fullstack MCP framework to develop MCP Apps for ChatGPT / Claude & MCP Servers for AI Agents.
repos.manual_desc: mcp-use: full-stack framework for building MCP apps.

repos.last_desc: Giving your agents a map and a memory for complex, loopy workflows. Because real-world logic isn't a straight line; it’s a state machine.
repos.manual_desc: LangGraph: stateful, cyclic workflows for agents.

repos.last_desc: The AI that treats your terminal like its own personal playground. Full OS access for agents who aren't afraid to get their hands dirty.
repos.manual_desc: Agent Zero: full-OS autonomous agent for power users.

repos.last_desc: A framework for building, orchestrating and deploying AI agents and multi-agent workflows with support for Python and .NET.
repos.manual_desc: Microsoft Agent Framework: build and orchestrate agents in Python/.NET.

repos.last_desc: Agentic logic for developers who actually care about type-safety. Strict validation meets loose AI dreams—the "Senior Dev" of agent frameworks.
repos.manual_desc: PydanticAI: typed agent logic with strict validation.

repos.last_desc: The conversational control layer for customer-facing AI agents - Parlant is a context-engineering framework optimized for controlling customer interactions.
repos.manual_desc: Control layer for customer-facing agents - context engineering for safer dialogs.

repos.last_desc: Pocket Flow: 100-line LLM framework. Let Agents build Agents!
repos.manual_desc: PocketFlow: tiny (100-line) LLM framework for agent builders.

repos.last_desc: Audiocraft is a library for audio processing and generation with deep learning. It features the state-of-the-art EnCodec audio compressor / tokenizer, along with MusicGen, a simple and controllable music generation LM with textual and melodic conditioning.
repos.manual_desc: Audio generation toolkit with EnCodec plus MusicGen for text/melody conditioning.

repos.last_desc: A simple yet powerful agent framework that delivers with open-source models
repos.manual_desc: youtu-agent: simple, powerful agent framework for open-source models.

repos.last_desc: The ultimate LLM/AI application development framework in Go.
repos.manual_desc: Eino: Go framework for LLM and AI application development.

repos.last_desc: "AutoAgent: Fully-Automated and Zero-Code LLM Agent Framework"
repos.manual_desc: AutoAgent: zero-code framework for fully automated LLM agents.

repos.last_desc: AI Agent Engineering Platform built on an Open Source TypeScript AI Agent Framework
repos.manual_desc: VoltAgent: TypeScript agent engineering platform for production apps.

repos.last_desc: Agent S: an open agentic framework that uses computers like a human
repos.manual_desc: Agent-S: agents that operate computers like humans do.

repos.last_desc: DeepSpeed is a deep learning optimization library that makes distributed training and inference easy, efficient, and effective.
repos.manual_desc: DeepSpeed: efficient distributed training and inference toolkit.

repos.last_desc: slime is an LLM post-training framework for RL Scaling.
repos.manual_desc: slime: post-training framework for RL scaling in LLMs.

repos.last_desc: AI Native Data App Development framework with AWEL(Agentic Workflow Expression Language) and Agents
repos.manual_desc: DB-GPT: AI-native data app framework with agents and workflows.

repos.last_desc: Data transformation framework for AI. Ultra performant, with incremental processing.  🌟 Star if you like it!
repos.manual_desc: CocoIndex: high-performance data transformation for AI pipelines.

repos.last_desc: Unified framework for building enterprise RAG pipelines with small, specialized models
repos.manual_desc: llmware: enterprise RAG framework with small, specialized models.

repos.last_desc: Open-source framework for conversational voice AI agents
repos.manual_desc: TEN: open-source framework for conversational voice agents.

repos.last_desc: KAG is a logical form-guided reasoning and retrieval framework based on OpenSPG engine and LLMs.  It is used to build logical reasoning and factual Q&A solutions for professional domain knowledge bases. It can effectively overcome the shortcomings of the traditional RAG vector similarity calculation model.
repos.manual_desc: Logic-guided reasoning plus retrieval for factual Q&A beyond vector-only RAG.

repos.last_desc: Bringing the power of Alibaba's AI ecosystem to the world of Enterprise Java. Serious AI for serious Spring developers who mean business.
repos.manual_desc: Spring-AI-Alibaba: enterprise Java AI integrations for Spring.

repos.last_desc: Evals is a framework for evaluating LLMs and LLM systems, and an open-source registry of benchmarks.
repos.manual_desc: Evals: framework and benchmark registry for LLM evaluation.

repos.last_desc: Agent framework and applications built upon Qwen>=3.0, featuring Function Calling, MCP, Code Interpreter, RAG, Chrome extension, etc.
repos.manual_desc: Qwen-Agent: agent framework and apps for Qwen models.

repos.last_desc: 🐫 CAMEL: The first and the best multi-agent framework. Finding the Scaling Law of Agents. https://www.camel-ai.org
repos.manual_desc: CAMEL: multi-agent framework focused on agent scaling research.

repos.last_desc: Unit testing for LLMs because vibes-based testing isn't a real production strategy. Quantitative sanity for your qualitative prompts—don't ship without it.
repos.manual_desc: LLM evaluation toolkit with unit tests, metrics, and regression checks.

repos.last_desc: Flexible and powerful framework for managing multiple AI agents and handling complex conversations
repos.manual_desc: Agent-Squad: manage multiple agents and complex conversations.

repos.last_desc: EasyR1: An Efficient, Scalable, Multi-Modality RL Training Framework based on veRL
repos.manual_desc: EasyR1: scalable multimodal RL training framework (veRL-based).

repos.last_desc: Koog is the official Kotlin framework for building predictable, fault-tolerant and enterprise-ready AI agents across all platforms – from backend services to Android and iOS, JVM, and even in-browser environments. Koog is based on our AI products expertise and provides proven solutions for complex LLM and AI problems
repos.manual_desc: JetBrains Kotlin framework for reliable AI agents across JVM, Android, iOS, and web.

repos.last_desc: Orchestrating agents at scale without the infrastructure nightmare. The conductor for your AI agent symphony, ensuring everyone stays in sync.
repos.manual_desc: Upsonic: orchestrate agent swarms at scale without the infra pain.

repos.last_desc: LangChain4j is an open-source Java library that simplifies the integration of LLMs into Java applications through a unified API, providing access to popular LLMs and vector databases. It makes implementing RAG, tool calling (including support for MCP), and agents easy. LangChain4j integrates seamlessly with various enterprise Java frameworks.
repos.manual_desc: Java-first LangChain for LLMs, RAG, tools (incl MCP), and agents via a unified API.

repos.last_desc: AI that doesn't just process—it listens, speaks, and vibes with you in real-time. The heartbeat of conversational AI, built for those who find latency to be a four-letter word.
repos.manual_desc: LiveKit Agents: low-latency voice agents for realtime conversational apps.
